payload.claim_text: An additional online reporting mechanism called 'Get It Fixed' located at https://mta.info/getitfixed, has been established. Get It Fixed is an online reporting portal developed for use by NYCT employees to report issues like customer behavior, equipment issues, climate/comfort, and cleanliness among other reportable topics.
payload.subject: NYCT employees
payload.description: Get It Fixed online reporting portal added to DOB ASP

tool_args.label: Get It Fixed Reporting Website - DOS

payload.claim_text: An additional online reporting mechanism called 'Get It Fixed' located at https://mta.info/getitfixed, has been established. payload.subject: NYCT employees
payload.description: Get It Fixed online reporting portal added to DOS ASP
